data.title: Kung Fu Tea partners with ADVANCED® to launch HYDRATION+ Immunity* during Lunar New Year with iconic tea flavors.
data.description: In New York on February 17, 2026, Kung Fu Tea, a prominent bubble tea brand in America, revealed a significant collaboration with supplement company ADVANCED® to introduce HYDRATION+ Immunity*. This new line of functional* beverages, launched during the Lunar New Year, combines renowned tea flavors with extra benefits.

data.title: NAESCO to host 2026 Federal Market Workshop on March 19 in Washington, D.C. to discuss infrastructure modernization.
data.description: In Washington, the National Association of Energy Service Companies (NAESCO) is set to host the 2026 Federal Market Workshop on March 19, 2026, at the National Housing Center (NAHB). This event will convene federal agency officials, Energy Service Companies (ESCOs), and industry partners to address the enhancement of federal energy and building infrastructure. Emphasis will be placed on exploring contracting mechanisms that facilitate dependable project execution. This one-day workshop aims to facilitate discussions surrounding the modernization of federal energy infrastructure.

data.title: Inventor from Houston creates DIPE WIPE, a two-in-one diapering product for convenience.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 17, 2026, an inventor from Houston, Texas, shared the inspiration behind their creation of the DIPE WIPE. The inventor mentioned that the aim was to consolidate all the essentials required for changing a baby's diaper into a single product. This innovative product design aims to alleviate the necessity of carrying multiple items for diaper changing. The DIPE WIPE has garnered attention for streamlining this process and providing convenience.

data.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson has passed away in Chicago. He was among the first Black clergy to publicly get tested for HIV.
data.description: A prominent civil rights leader, Reverend Jesse Jackson, has passed away in Chicago at the age of [insert age] after battling a long illness, as confirmed by the AIDS Healthcare Foundation. Reverend Jackson, who was among the first Black clergy to publicly undergo HIV testing, played a vital role in combating the stigma associated with the disease within the African American community. Additionally, he was at the forefront of encouraging other clergy members to actively engage in addressing HIV issues both domestically and globally. Reverend Jackson's legacy extends beyond this, having formed close relationships with various leaders and being recognized for his immense contributions in the civil rights movement.

data.title: Euro-Wall introduces Horizon Multi Slide™ for coastal use, prioritizing performance, design, and serviceability.
data.description: Euro-Wall introduced the Horizon Multi Slide™ in North Port, Florida on February 17, 2026. This sliding door system was designed to meet the tough requirements of coastal environments. The product aims to blend performance, design, and serviceability based on input from installers, builders, and architects.

data.title: Wynn Resorts partners with Chef's Table for culinary events starting this fall. Brightest stars in industry involved.
data.description: A major partnership has begun between a company and the renowned culinary brand. The collaboration includes a series of food and beverage events showcasing top figures in the industry. The announcement was made in Las Vegas on Feb. 17, 2026. Wynn Resorts (Nasdaq: WYNN) is at the helm of this venture with Chef's Table.

data.title: Midea debuts large home appliance lineup at KBIS 2026, becoming a full-home solutions provider. #expansion
data.description: Midea America has recently announced the launch of its largest range of home appliances and climate control products to date at the 2026 Kitchen & Bath Industry Show in Orlando, Florida on February 17th. This move highlights the brand's transition into a comprehensive provider of solutions for the entire home, covering various aspects from kitchen appliances to climate comfort. The extensive lineup showcased includes a wide array of products, reflecting the brand's dedication to catering to diverse customer needs.

data.title: Calix launches Calix One, an AI-native platform for service providers, offering personalized experiences at scale.
data.description: In San Jose, California, Calix, Inc. (NYSE: CALX) has introduced Calix One™, marking the next phase of its platform. This launch integrates Calix’s complete range of offerings, including appliances, cloud software, AI-driven agents (Calix Agent Workforce Cloud™), and managed services, all within one consolidated platform. Utilizing an enterprise digital workforce framework, the refined platform streamlines agentic-led changes in business and operational workflows for communication service providers.

data.title: IV Drips expands mobile IV therapy to Palm Beach, FL with over 55,000 treatments administered nationwide.
data.description: Leading provider IV Drips, known for administering 55,000+ treatments across the US, has introduced concierge IV infusion services in Palm Beach and nearby South Florida areas. This move marks a significant expansion for the company, offering medical-grade IV therapy to more individuals in the region.

data.title: Diverse Logistics & Pulse Final Mile merge to form big & bulky final mile logistics co. One of the largest in industry.
data.description: Tampa, Florida and Anaheim, California - On February 17, 2026, Diverse Logistics and Pulse Final Mile revealed their merger, establishing one of the leading independent Big & Bulky final-mile third-party logistics entities. This collaboration marks a significant milestone in the industry, bringing together two companies to enhance their operations and expand their reach in the market.

data.title: NVIDIA introduces 5-part plan for enterprise RAG systems to tap into $10.5B market by 2030.
data.description: NVIDIA has introduced the Enterprise RAG Blueprint, which offers a modular architecture for multimodal AI knowledge systems. This blueprint is aimed at capturing a significant share of the projected $10.5 billion RAG tooling market by 2030. The goal is to provide a versatile and efficient solution for businesses looking to implement AI technologies.

data.title: Pagos expands MCP Server for merchants to access verified payments data via AI chat agents.
data.description: In Los Angeles on February 17, 2026, Pagos, a company specializing in AI-driven payments intelligence, unveiled a significant enhancement to its Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server. This update allows merchants to now retrieve their authenticated and unified payments information via AI chat agents.

data.title: Ormco Forum 2026 unites top orthodontic leaders globally, showcasing advances in orthodontics. #BREA #PRNewswire #OrthodonticsGoodAtOrmco™
data.description: Ormco™ Corporation, a top player in orthodontic products and education for over six decades, is hosting The Ormco Forum 2026, an event highlighting cutting-edge advancements in orthodontics. Set to take place in BREA, Calif., on February 17, 2026, this premier clinical education event will draw attention to new approaches shaping the field.

data.title: Cacique Intimates releases Lightest Lift™ bra with 40% lighter padding for cups up to F, G and H. Clever design aids gravity-defying lift.
data.description: Cacique Intimates, a popular fuller cup bra brand based in Columbus, Ohio, launched Lightest Lift, a new bra with padding that is 40% lighter than the average bra. The Lightest Lift bra offers airy support and impressive lift, even in cup sizes up to F, G, and H. This innovative design provides a gravity-defying experience for customers seeking comfort and style in their undergarments. The lightweight padding sets this bra apart as a groundbreaking solution in the lingerie industry.

data.title: Expert Jason Guck discusses small business energy risks and benefits of microgrids in Rochester, NY. When to consider switch?
data.description: In Rochester, New York on February 17, 2026, an article discusses the advantages of microgrids in enhancing reliability for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). It explores the factors businesses should consider when deciding to opt for a microgrid instead of solely depending on the local utility. This piece emphasizes the importance of weighing the costs associated with implementing a microgrid against the risks of experiencing outages and the potential daily savings. HelloNation offers insights on this topic, aiming to aid SMBs in making informed decisions.
Fed's Barr: AI investment is wildly indifferent to what the Fed rate target is.

data.title: Vibe aims to target tech insiders with specialized billboards in the Bay Area, setting new standards in microtargeting.
data.description: There has been a rise in billboards in the Bay Area that may seem perplexing to those not in the tech industry. Notably, a company has elevated the practice of microtargeting to a new high.

data.title: Pender Growth Fund to undertake Normal Course Issuer Bid on TSXV, subject to acceptance.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 17, 2026, Pender Growth Fund Inc. (TSXV: PTF) declared its intention to initiate a Normal Course Issuer Bid (NCIB) to the TSX Venture Exchange (TSXV). The company plans to repurchase a certain number of its outstanding common shares through the TSXV. The bid is pending approval from the TSXV.

data.title: Dragonfly secures $650M fund, spotlighting real-world assets as crypto VC landscape evolves towards core financial infrastructure.
data.description: The recent increase in funding for Dragonfly demonstrates a shift in crypto venture capital towards tokenized real-world assets, payments, and core financial infrastructure crucial for institutional involvement. This highlights the growing importance of these sectors in the crypto market.
